landing.hero_subtitle: Scholarships, jobs, professional documents — Malayka guides you at every step of your journey.
landing.signup_hint: Sign up in 2 minutes · No card required
landing.features_subtitle: One app for all your ambitions
landing.feature_1_desc: Create goals and receive a step-by-step action plan.
landing.feature_2_desc: Scholarships, job offers and competitions matched to your profile every day.
landing.feature_3_desc: CV, business plan, cover letter — generated and editable instantly.
landing.feature_4_desc: Scholarships, academic competitions and training tailored to your field.
landing.feature_5_desc: Prepare interviews, optimize your CV, find the best offers.
landing.feature_6_desc: Receive the best opportunities directly on WhatsApp.
landing.testimonial_1_text: I found my job in 5 days. The AI handled everything for me.
landing.testimonial_2_text: My CV was optimized in 2 minutes. I had an interview the following week.
landing.testimonial_3_text: The generated business plan was better than what I could have done myself.
landing.cta_final_desc: Join thousands of students and professionals who use Malayka to reach their goals.
landing.hero_subtitle_v2: A personal AI Mentor that guides students, job seekers, freelancers and businesses step by step to find the best opportunities and better execute their goals by analyzing the web in real time to detect relevant opportunities.
landing.hero_trust: Free to start · No card required · Available on mobile
landing.how_1_desc: Tell us who you are, your goals and your field. 2 minutes. No card.
landing.how_2_desc: Personalized action plan, professional documents generated on demand.
landing.how_3_desc: Receive the best matching offers on WhatsApp, every day.
landing.for_whom_subtitle: Whatever your background, Malayka adapts to your ambitions.
landing.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
landing.faq_l1_a: Malayka is an AI mentor created by Yalna Technologies for students and professionals in French-speaking Africa. It helps you define goals, builds personalized action plans, generates professional documents, and recommends opportunities matched to your profile every day.
landing.faq_l2_a: Yes, Malayka is free to start. Core features are accessible without payment. Credits are available for advanced usage like unlimited document generation.
landing.faq_l3_a: Malayka is for students, graduates, job seekers and professionals across French-speaking Africa. If you have a goal to reach, Malayka is for you.
landing.faq_l4_q: What languages does the AI speak?
landing.faq_l4_a: Malayka speaks fluent French and English. The interface and AI both adapt to your chosen language from settings.
landing.faq_l5_q: How does Malayka find opportunities for me?
landing.faq_l5_a: Malayka continuously scans hundreds of sources and matches them to your profile. You only receive what truly fits, with a relevance score.
landing.faq_l6_a: Yes. All your data is encrypted and stored securely. Malayka never sells your information to third parties.
landing.faq_l7_q: Do I need to download an app?
landing.faq_l7_a: No. Malayka is a Progressive Web App (PWA). Access it from your phone browser and add it to your home screen in seconds for a native app experience.
landing.faq_l8_a: When Malayka detects an opportunity matching your profile, it sends a notification directly to WhatsApp. You stay informed even when not connected to the app.
landing.how_4_desc: The AI helps you apply effectively, tracks your progress and adapts its recommendations to your evolution in real time.
landing.footer_mission: AI for human capital development in Africa.

install.ios_desc: Follow these steps in Safari to add Malayka to your home screen.
install.android_desc: Add Malayka to your home screen in seconds.
install.safari_warning: This installation requires Safari. If you are using Chrome, copy the link and open it in Safari.
install.ios_step_1: Open Safari on your iPhone or iPad.
install.ios_step_3: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the screen.
install.ios_step_4: Scroll down and select "Add to Home Screen".
install.fullscreen_hint: The app will open full screen, without a browser bar, like a native app.
install.android_step_2: Tap the 3 dots in the top right.
install.installed_hint: Malayka is now on your home screen.
install.banner_android_hint: Quick access from your home screen, even offline.

help.title: Help & Support
help.faq_1_q: How do I create a goal?
help.faq_1_a: Go to the "For Me" tab, click "New goal", choose a theme and configure your notification preferences. The AI will automatically create an action plan for you.
help.faq_2_q: How does the AI mentor work?
help.faq_2_a: The AI analyzes your profile, goals and conversations to offer personalized recommendations. It can generate documents, answer your questions and help you prepare applications.
help.faq_3_q: How do I generate a CV or cover letter?
help.faq_3_a: Go to the "Deliverables" tab, choose "CV Analysis" or another deliverable. The AI will use your profile to generate a professional document you can edit and download.
help.faq_4_q: How do I receive opportunity recommendations?
help.faq_4_a: Create a goal and chat with the AI. It extracts your intent and matches your profile with relevant job offers, scholarships or funding in the "For Me" tab.
help.faq_5_a: Yes! You can enable WhatsApp alerts to receive the best opportunities directly on your phone. Configure this in your notification preferences.
help.faq_6_q: How does the credits system work?
help.faq_6_a: Credits allow you to generate advanced documents and access premium features. You receive free credits upon registration. You can purchase additional packs.
help.faq_7_q: Can I edit an AI-generated document?
help.faq_7_a: Yes, all generated documents are editable. Click on the document in the chat, edit the content, then download it as PDF or share a link.
help.faq_8_a: All communications are encrypted (SSL 256-bit). Your personal data is never shared with third parties. You can request account deletion at any time.
help.faq_9_q: How do I install the app on my phone?
help.faq_9_a: Malayka is a PWA. On Android: click "Add to Home Screen" in Chrome's menu. On iOS: open in Safari, click Share → "Add to Home Screen".
help.faq_10_q: How do I report a problem?
help.faq_10_a: Contact us via WhatsApp or email (below). Describe the problem with a screenshot if possible. Our team responds within 24h.
help.faq_11_a: Previously visited pages are available offline thanks to PWA cache. Document generation and AI require an internet connection.
help.faq_12_q: How do I change the language?
help.faq_12_a: Go to Settings (your avatar) → Language → French or English. The change is immediate.
help.faq_13_q: Can I share a generated document?
help.faq_13_a: Yes! In the document viewer, click the Share icon. A link is generated automatically. Anyone with the link can view it without signing in.
help.faq_14_q: How do I enable dark mode?
help.faq_14_a: Go to Settings → Preferences → toggle the Theme switch. The choice is saved automatically.
help.faq_15_a: Yes, all generated documents are associated with your conversations and remain accessible from the corresponding chat. You can edit, export as PDF or share at any time.
